message:
test(search): freeze API contract + baseline regression corpus (ft-dr6zv.1.3.1)

51 tests freezing the entire search public API surface for the
frankensearch migration: type shapes, enum variants, serde roundtrips,
config defaults, JSON schema structural assertions, diagnostic codes,
and deterministic regression corpus (index→search→verify).

Contract coverage: SearchDocumentSource, IndexingConfig, IndexableDocument,
IndexedDocument, ScrollbackLine, IndexFlushReason, IndexingIngestReport,
SearchIndexStats, HybridSearchService, SearchMode, FusionBackend,
FusedResult, TwoTierMetrics, ChunkPolicyConfig, ChunkDirection,
ChunkSourceOffset, EmbedderTier, EmbedderInfo, HashEmbedder, Embedder
trait, Reranker trait, PassthroughReranker, ScoredDoc, SearchExplain
diagnostic codes (NO_INDEXED_DATA, PANE_NOT_FOUND, CAPTURE_GAPS,
RETENTION_CLEANUP), render_explain_plain, and wa-robot-search.json
schema freeze.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
